summary: Frontend testing of Vastgoed Kiosk UI/text fixes. All 12 features tested and working correctly. Form vertical centering with transition works (centered when keyboard hidden, shifts up with pt-3 when keyboard opens). All text corrections to verhuurder (landlord) perspective verified. Uitloggen button visible with icon and works correctly.

test_results.landing_page_title: PASS - Left panel title says 'Appartement Kiosk' (not 'Huur Betalings Kiosk')
test_results.landing_page_description: PASS - Description says 'Beheer uw appartementen en ontvang huurbetalingen vanuit één platform'
test_results.form_centered_no_keyboard: PASS - Form has 'flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center' classes when keyboard hidden
test_results.form_shifts_up_with_keyboard: PASS - Form has 'pt-3' class (no justify-center) when keyboard opens
test_results.form_returns_to_center: PASS - Form returns to centered state when keyboard closes
test_results.kiosk_welcome_left_panel: PASS - Says 'Beheer huurbetalingen, servicekosten en meer via deze zelfbedieningskiosk'
test_results.kiosk_welcome_right_panel: PASS - Says 'Snel, eenvoudig en veilig huurbetalingen ontvangen'
test_results.logged_in_uitloggen_visible: PASS - Uitloggen button visible at bottom left with icon
test_results.logged_in_right_panel_text: PASS - Says 'Plaats deze URL op uw kiosk apparaat'
test_results.uitloggen_button_works: PASS - Clicking Uitloggen logs out and shows login form
test_results.virtual_keyboard_typing: PASS - Virtual keyboard typing works on email and password fields
test_results.physical_keyboard_typing: PASS - Physical keyboard typing works on all fields

features_tested: Login form is vertically centered in the right panel when keyboard is hidden
Login form shifts up when virtual keyboard opens to make room
Login form shifts back to center when keyboard closes
Landing page left panel text says 'Appartement Kiosk' not 'Huur Betalings Kiosk'
Landing page description says 'Beheer uw appartementen en ontvang huurbetalingen vanuit één platform'
Kiosk welcome page says 'Beheer huurbetalingen, servicekosten en meer via deze zelfbedieningskiosk'
Kiosk welcome right panel says 'Snel, eenvoudig en veilig huurbetalingen ontvangen'
Logged-in page has visible 'Uitloggen' button with icon at bottom left
Logged-in page right panel says 'Plaats deze URL op uw kiosk apparaat'
Uitloggen button works correctly (logs out and shows login form)
Virtual keyboard still works correctly (typing on email and password)
Physical keyboard still works correctly on all fields
critical_code_review_comments: Form centering logic correctly implemented using conditional Tailwind classes
Transition animation (duration-300 ease-in-out) provides smooth form movement
All text correctly updated to verhuurder (landlord) perspective
Uitloggen button has proper data-testid and icon (LogIn rotated 180deg)
Virtual keyboard auto-detects touchscreen via navigator.maxTouchPoints
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account from iteration_67
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 UI/text fixes verified working. Form centering uses conditional classes: 'flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center' when showKeyboard=false, 'pt-3' when showKeyboard=true. Text corrections: 'Appartement Kiosk' title, 'Beheer uw appartementen...' description, 'Beheer huurbetalingen...' on welcome page, 'Snel, eenvoudig en veilig huurbetalingen ontvangen' on right panel. Uitloggen button visible with icon at bottom left of logged-in page. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
